---
title: "Projects"
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    includes:
      in_header: header.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-brand">AM</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="about.html">About Me</a></li>
    <li><a href="projects.html" class="active">Projects</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="page-hero">
  <h1 class="page-title">Projects</h1>
  <div class="title-underline"></div>
  <p class="page-subtitle">A selection of my research and data work</p>
</section>

<section class="projects-section">
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-header" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #c9a96e, #8b6c42);">
        <span class="project-emoji">📊</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-tags">
          <span class="tag small">R</span>
          <span class="tag small">ggplot2</span>
          <span class="tag small">Statistics</span>
        </div>
        <h3>Project Title One</h3>
        <p>A brief description of what this project does, the problem it solves, and what methods or tools you used. Keep it clear and engaging.</p>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/yourusername/project1" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
          <a href="#" class="btn-outline">View Demo</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-header" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6e8ec9, #3a5f8b);">
        <span class="project-emoji">🧪</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-tags">
          <span class="tag small">Python</span>
          <span class="tag small">Machine Learning</span>
        </div>
        <h3>Project Title Two</h3>
        <p>A brief description of what this project does, the problem it solves, and what methods or tools you used. Keep it clear and engaging.</p>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/yourusername/project2" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
          <a href="#" class="btn-outline">Read Paper</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-header" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8ec96e, #4a8b42);">
        <span class="project-emoji">🗺️</span>
      </div>
      <div class="project-body">
        <div class="project-tags">
          <span class="tag small">R</span>
          <span class="tag small">Shiny</span>
          <span class="tag small">Dashboard</span>
        </div>
        <h3>Project Title Three</h3>
        <p>A brief description of what this project does, the problem it solves, and what methods or tools you used. Keep it clear and engaging.</p>
        <div class="project-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/yourusername/project3" class="btn-outline" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
          <a href="#" class="btn-outline">Live App</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="project-card add-project">
      <div class="add-icon">+</div>
      <p>More projects coming soon!</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Anastasiia Merchanskaia · Built with R Markdown</p>
  <div class="social-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</footer>
